name: First Horizon Bank
description_short: First Horizon Bank is a full-service regional bank offering personal and business banking, mortgages, investment services, and wealth management across multiple states.
description_long:
First Horizon Bank operates as a comprehensive financial institution positioned with "big bank reach" and "small bank roots." The bank serves both individual consumers and businesses through a nationwide network, leveraging significant institutional resources while maintaining a customer-focused approach. The company maintains a strong digital presence with mobile and online banking platforms designed for convenience and accessibility.

The bank offers an extensive range of financial products across personal, small business, and commercial segments. Personal banking includes multiple checking and savings account tiers (FirstView, SmartView, TotalView), CDs, money market accounts, mortgages (purchase, refinance, construction), home equity lines of credit, personal and vehicle loans, and Visa credit cards at multiple reward levels. Small business customers access specialized checking accounts (BizEssentials line), business credit cards, SBA loans, equipment financing, cash management solutions, and payroll processing. The commercial and specialty division provides treasury management, commercial real estate lending, trade finance, industry-specific lending (restaurant, fitness, entertainment), and wealth management services.

First Horizon distinguishes itself through industry-specific lending expertise, comprehensive treasury management for businesses, trust and estate planning services, and a multi-tiered account structure allowing consumers to select products matching their specific needs. The bank also offers integrated digital tools including Zelle integration, mobile deposit, bill pay, and budgeting features. Their commercial offerings include correspondent banking services, asset-based lending, and specialty finance products unavailable at many regional competitors.

As a traditional bank, First Horizon serves customers seeking full-service financial relationships rather than specialty products. The institution caters to established consumers with decent credit and businesses with revenue history, making it less accessible to those needing credit-building products or emergency cash solutions. Digital-first consumers may find the platform adequate but not as streamlined as pure neobanks, and those seeking specialized services (credit repair, debt relief) should look elsewhere. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking accounts (FirstView, SmartView, TotalView checking)
Savings products (traditional savings, money market, regular CDs, jumbo CDs)
Mortgages and home loans (purchase, refinance, construction, home equity lines of credit)
Personal and vehicle loans (auto loans, boat/yacht loans, RV loans, unsecured personal loans)
Credit cards (Visa Signature, Platinum Visa, Visa Classic, Visa Classic Secure, business cards)
Small business banking (BizEssentials checking accounts, business credit cards, payroll processing)
SBA loans, equipment financing, commercial real estate lending, and specialty finance
Digital banking services (mobile app, online banking, mobile deposit, bill pay, Zelle integration)
Wealth management (financial planning, investment services, insurance, trust and estate planning)
Treasury management and cash management (ACH services, positive pay, lockbox, remote deposit capture, wire transfers)
Merchant services and commercial card programs
Fraud protection and credit report dispute services
pros: Diverse checking account options (FirstView, SmartView, TotalView) allowing customers to select based on their usage patterns and needs
Comprehensive mortgage products including purchase, refinance, construction, and home equity lines of credit with dedicated home lending resources
Specialized small business lending programs including SBA loans, equipment financing, accounts receivable solutions, and merchant services
Industry expertise in niche lending areas (restaurant finance, fitness finance, music/sports/entertainment) supporting specialized business sectors
Integrated digital banking with Zelle, mobile deposit, bill pay, and mobile app for convenient account management
Full wealth management services including financial planning, investment services, trust and estate planning, and corporate retirement plans
Treasury management and cash management solutions for businesses including lockbox services, positive pay, and ACH services
cons: Limited information on specific APR rates, fees, or competitive positioning compared to other banks visible on the website
No emphasis on credit-building products, secured cards, or solutions for consumers with poor credit histories
Wealth management and specialized commercial services likely require minimum account balances or asset requirements not disclosed
Regional bank with potential geographic limitations despite claims of nationwide reach, requiring verification of branch and service availability
No mention of emergency lending, payday alternatives, or fast cash products for consumers needing immediate small-dollar funds
best_for: Consumers seeking comprehensive personal banking with multiple account tiers and integrated digital services
Small business owners requiring multiple banking products (checking, credit cards, loans, payroll, cash management) from a single institution
Commercial customers in specialized industries (restaurant, fitness, entertainment, healthcare) seeking lenders with industry expertise
High-net-worth individuals and families needing wealth management, trust services, and investment planning
diagnosis: First Horizon Bank is best for established consumers and businesses seeking a full-service banking relationship with comprehensive products, digital convenience, and specialized expertise. The primary caveat is that this is a traditional bank requiring decent credit and financial standing, not suitable for consumers with poor credit histories, those needing emergency short-term cash, or those seeking credit-building solutions—these customers should explore specialized lenders instead.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: First Horizon Bank offers personal and business banking, mortgages, investment services, and wealth management across multiple states.
